//: Container-as-dialogue: loot is just addItem effects gated by flags. A passive Sleight voice reveals a hidden compartment with bonus loot — environment reacting to skills.

closed.text: Three crates of millwright's salvage slump against the old wall, stenciled with the Greyreach wheel-mark and sealed with more nails than faith. Pell's crowbar lies defeated on top of them.

voices.text: The third crate's base sits a finger too high off the ground. False bottom. Millwrights and smugglers used the same joiners in this county.

opened.text: The nails give way with a screech Pell probably heard with his heart. Inside, packed in straw: a heavy bronze drive cog stamped with the millwright's mark, two flasks of banked quarry-fire, and a draught that fizzes when you tilt it.

options.text: Lift the third crate's false bottom.

looted.text: The opened crates sit in their straw. You've had the honest layer.

voices.text: That third crate still rides a finger high. The false bottom is right there, being smug about it.

options.text: Lift the third crate's false bottom.

hidden.text: Your fingers find the joiner's catch on the first try. The panel lifts on a shallow tray lined with felt: one more flask of quarry-fire, and a tarnished locket holding a sliver of bell-bronze that hums — very softly, very deliberately — against your palm. It hums a little louder when you point it north, toward the mill.

empty.text: Straw, sprung nails, and an open false bottom. Pell's 'half-shares' have been thoroughly optimized.
